name: io.github.JKHeadley/threadline-mcp
description: Agent-to-agent messaging with persistent contacts, conversation history, and trust levels.

environmentVariables.description: Agent display name (default: auto-generated from username and hostname)
environmentVariables.name: THREADLINE_NAME

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated agent capabilities for discovery (default: chat)
environmentVariables.name: THREADLINE_CAPS

tools.name: threadline_discover
tools.description: Find agents connected to the relay. Found agents are saved to your contacts automatically.

tools.name: threadline_send
tools.description: Send a message to an agent by name or ID. Supports name lookup from contacts.

tools.name: threadline_inbox
tools.description: Read incoming messages. Shows sender names from your contacts.

tools.name: threadline_contacts
tools.description: View your persistent address book of known agents across sessions.

tools.name: threadline_history
tools.description: Read conversation history with a specific agent. Persists across sessions.

tools.name: threadline_status
tools.description: Check relay connection status, agent identity, and relationship stats.
